text: Very disappointing experience with Urban Company. The technician visited, checked the refrigerator, and immediately said the sensor was faulty and advised me to call the Haier service team instead. When the Haier technician came, they found that the sensor was perfectly fine,the actual issue was simply low refrigerant gas. This caused unnecessary confusion, wasted my time, and delayed the repair. Urban Company should ensure their technicians diagnose problems accurately before giving conclusion
